calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Notice Of Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances;
Roger E. Jackson, Esq., T:707.318.2994, specially appearing for the plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Granted. No opposition filed.

Judgment was signed. Judgment will not be filed until an order is signed. Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Continued To Mar-04-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
